name: data-pipeline
description: Production data pipelines with Dagster, Prefect, Airflow. Covers batch, ETL/ELT, batch, incremental, streaming, data quality, lineage, cataloging, and orchestration.
author: anwar

commands.name: de:batch
commands.prompt:
Create production batch pipeline with:
- Orchestrator: Dagster (assets, partitions, sensors) / Prefect (flows, tasks, deployments) / Airflow (DAGs, TaskFlow, XComs)
- Processing: Polars (lazy, streaming), DuckDB, PySpark, Ibis
- Storage: Parquet, Delta Lake, Iceberg, Hudi, LanceDB
- Partitioning: Hive, date, bucket, range
- Incremental: CDC, merge, upsert, time travel
- Quality: Great Expectations, Soda, dbt tests, custom checks
- Lineage: OpenLineage, DataHub, Amundsen
- Catalog: Unity Catalog, Polaris, Glue, Hive Metastore
- Scheduling: cron, event-driven, SLAs
- Monitoring: metrics, alerts, dashboards
- Testing: unit, integration, contract, data diffs
- CI/CD: GitOps, preview environments, blue-green

commands.name: de:dbt
commands.prompt:
Create dbt project with:
- Structure: staging, intermediate, marts, metrics
- Models: incremental, materialized views, snapshots
- Tests: schema, data, singular, generic, custom
- Docs: descriptions, columns, lineage, exposures
- Macros: reusable, dispatch, packages
- Seeds: reference data, static tables
- Snapshots: SCD type 1/2, timestamp/strategy
- Contracts: enforced schemas, model contracts
- Packages: dbt-utils, dbt-expectations, dbt-audit-helper
- CI: slim CI, PR preview, data diffs
- Deployment: dbt Cloud, dbt Core + CI/CD
- Performance: incremental predicates, clustering, partitioning

arguments.name: warehouse
arguments.description: snowflake, bigquery, redshift, databricks, postgres, duckdb

commands.name: de:quality
commands.prompt:
Implement data quality with:
- Great Expectations: expectations, checkpoints, data docs, profiling
- Soda Core: checks, scans, monitors, anomaly detection
- dbt tests: unique, not_null, accepted_values, relationships
- Custom: statistical, ML-based, business rule checks
- Metrics: freshness, volume, schema, distribution, completeness
- Anomaly detection: Z-score, IQR, isolation forest, Prophet
- Alerting: Slack, PagerDuty, email, webhooks
- Root cause: lineage tracing, impact analysis
- Remediation: quarantine, retry, backfill, manual review
- Reporting: dashboards, data quality scorecards

commands.name: de:catalog
commands.prompt:
Set up data catalog with:
- Catalog: DataHub, Amundsen, OpenMetadata, Purview, Unity Catalog
- Metadata: technical, business, operational, social
- Lineage: column-level, cross-system, transformation logic
- Governance: policies, tags, glossary, ownership
- Discovery: search, browsing, popularity, usage
- Access: RBAC, ABAC, data contracts, approval workflows
- Quality: scores, monitors, incidents, SLA tracking
- Integration: dbt, Airflow, Spark, BI tools, ETL tools
- API: GraphQL, REST, OpenLineage ingestion

agents.name: data-engineer
agents.description: Data engineer for scalable pipeline development
agents.prompt: You are a senior Data Engineer. Build reliable, scalable data systems with: Dagster/Prefect, Polars/DuckDB/PySpark, Delta/Iceberg, dbt, Great Expectations. Focus on: idempotency, exactly-once, incremental processing, data quality, lineage, cost optimization, developer experience. Write production code with tests, docs, monitoring.
